    • rated

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams rated(boolean rated)

    • rated

      Parameters:
      tokenWhite -
      tokenBlack -

    • addPairing

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams addPairing(ChallengesAuth.BulkParams.Pairing pairing)

    • pairAt

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams pairAt(long pairAt)
      Parameters:
      pairAt - Date at which the games will be created.
      Up to 24h in the future.
      Omit, or set to current date and time, to start the games immediately.

    • pairAt

      default ChallengesAuth.BulkParams pairAt(ZonedDateTime pairAt)
      Parameters:
      pairAt - Date at which the games will be created.
      Up to 24h in the future.
      Omit, or set to current date and time, to start the games immediately.

    • pairAt

      default ChallengesAuth.BulkParams pairAt(Function<ZonedDateTime,ZonedDateTime> now)
      Parameters:
      now - Date at which the games will be created, from a given ZonedDateTime.now() instance.
      Up to 24h in the future.
      Omit, or set to current date and time, to start the games immediately.

    • startClocksAt

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams startClocksAt(long startClocksAt)
      Parameters:
      startClocksAt - Date at which the clocks will be automatically started.
      Up to 24h in the future.
      Note that the clocks can start earlier than specified, if players start making moves in the game.
      If omitted, the clocks will not start automatically.

    • startClocksAt

      default ChallengesAuth.BulkParams startClocksAt(ZonedDateTime startClocksAt)
      Parameters:
      startClocksAt - Date at which the clocks will be automatically started.
      Up to 24h in the future.
      Note that the clocks can start earlier than specified, if players start making moves in the game.
      If omitted, the clocks will not start automatically.

    • startClocksAt

      default ChallengesAuth.BulkParams startClocksAt(Function<ZonedDateTime,ZonedDateTime> now)
      Parameters:
      now - Date at which the clocks will be automatically started, from a given ZonedDateTime.now() instance.
      Up to 24h in the future.
      Note that the clocks can start earlier than specified, if players start making moves in the game.
      If omitted, the clocks will not start automatically.

    • variant

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams variant(Enums.VariantName variant)
      Parameters:
      variant - The variant to use in games

    • variant

      default ChallengesAuth.BulkParams variant(Function<Enums.VariantName.Provider,Enums.VariantName> variant)
      Parameters:
      variant - The variant to use in games

    • fen

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams fen(String fen)
      Custom initial position (in FEN). Variant must be standard, fromPosition, or chess960 (if a valid 960 starting position), and the game cannot be rated.
      Default: "rnbqkbnr/pppppppp/8/8/8/8/PPPPPPPP/RNBQKBNR w KQkq - 0 1"

    • message

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams message(String message)
      Parameters:
      message - Message that will be sent to each player, when the game is created.
      It is sent from your user account.
      Default: "Your game with {opponent} is ready: {game}."

    • noAbort

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams noAbort()

    • noRematch

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams noRematch()

    • noGiveTime

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams noGiveTime()

    • noClaimWin

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams noClaimWin()

    • noEarlyDraw

      ChallengesAuth.BulkParams noEarlyDraw()
